summary: The two-dimensional ferroelectric (FE) material CuInP$_2$S$_6$ (CIPS) has garnered considerable interest due to its out-of-plane ferroelectricity at room temperature. However, a notable discrepancy exists between experiments and density functional theory (DFT) calculations regarding the ground state of CIPS thin films: experiments suggest a state with net polarization, while DFT predicts an antiferroelectric (AFE) state as the lowest-energy state. Here, we investigate the stability of polarization states in CIPS thin films by combining first-principles calculations with the deep potential (DP) method. Our results reveal that for films thicker than the bilayer, an AFE state that has intralayer AFE ordering in the inner layers and intralayer FE ordering in the two surface layers has the lowest electronic energy. This state is significantly lower than the uniform FE state. In addition, we find that a ferrielectric (FiE) state with pure intralayer FE ordering is very close to the AFE state in energy. By using the DP model, we calculated the phonon free energy of CIPS thin films. For the monolayer, the intralayer FE ordering possesses a lower phonon free energy than the intralayer AFE ordering. This energetic preference for the intralayer FE ordering maintains as the thickness grows. Consequently, when the phonon-free energy is incorporated, the FiE state becomes energetically favorable over the AFE state for multilayers CIPS. Our findings demonstrate that the inclusion of vibrational entropy stabilizes the FiE state as the ground state in multilayers CIPS at finite temperatures, reconciling the previous discrepancy between experimental observations and DFT predictions. This insight is vital for understanding the FE properties of CIPS and its potential applications in devices.

AI.tldr: 通过结合第一性原理计算和深度势能方法，研究发现考虑振动熵后，多层CuInP2S6薄膜的基态是铁电态而非反铁电态，解决了实验与DFT预测之间的差异。
AI.motivation: 二维铁电材料CuInP2S6在室温下具有面外铁电性，但实验观测与DFT计算存在矛盾：实验显示净极化态，而DFT预测反铁电态为基态。需要解决这一差异以理解其铁电性质。
AI.method: 结合第一性原理计算和深度势能方法，研究CIPS薄膜极化态的稳定性。计算电子能量和声子自由能，分析不同厚度薄膜的能量状态。
AI.result: 对于双层以上薄膜，反铁电态（内层为层内反铁电序、表面层为层内铁电序）具有最低电子能量。但铁电态能量接近反铁电态。考虑声子自由能后，铁电态在多层CIPS中变得能量更有利。
AI.conclusion: 振动熵的纳入使铁电态在有限温度下成为多层CIPS的基态，解决了实验观测与DFT预测之间的差异。这一发现对理解CIPS的铁电性质及其器件应用至关重要。

title: Many-body Josephson diode effect in superconducting quantum interferometers
summary: We propose a many-body mechanism for a strong Josephson diode effect (JDE) in an interacting nanoscale SQUID formed by two parallel quantum dots coupled to superconducting leads. Unlike conventional diode behavior, where nonreciprocity originates from a skewed current-phase relation within a single, continuously evolving ground state, the JDE reported here is \emph{branch selected}: the positive and negative critical currents are optimized on different many-body branches across the $0$-$π$ phase boundary, yielding a substantial enhancement of the diode efficiency. We further show that a \emph{nonlocal} Cooper-pair tunneling channel, which binds the two electrons on different arms, is essential: it reshapes the $0$-$π$ boundary and produces a pronounced ``diode band'' in parameter space, in sharp contrast to the fragile hotspot obtained when only local Cooper-pair transfer is available. While the key physics is captured by an effective model in the superconducting atomic limit, our conclusions remain robust for realistic finite-gap devices, as demonstrated within a generalized atomic-limit framework.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于多体机制的强约瑟夫森二极管效应，通过两个平行量子点与超导引线耦合的纳米SQUID实现。与传统的二极管行为不同，该效应是分支选择的：正负临界电流在跨越0-π相边界的多个多体分支上分别优化，从而显著提高二极管效率。
AI.motivation: 传统约瑟夫森二极管效应的非互易性通常源于单个连续演化基态中的倾斜电流-相位关系，效率有限。本文旨在探索一种基于多体相互作用的新机制，通过分支选择策略来显著增强二极管效率。
AI.method: 构建了一个由两个平行量子点与超导引线耦合形成的纳米SQUID系统。采用超导原子极限下的有效模型来捕捉关键物理机制，并推广到有限能隙的现实器件中验证鲁棒性。特别强调了非局域库珀对隧穿通道的重要性。
AI.result: 发现了分支选择的约瑟夫森二极管效应：正负临界电流在不同多体分支上优化，跨越0-π相边界，显著提高了二极管效率。非局域库珀对隧穿通道重塑了0-π边界，在参数空间中产生了明显的"二极管带"，与仅局部库珀对转移时的脆弱热点形成鲜明对比。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种基于多体相互作用和分支选择机制的新型强约瑟夫森二极管效应，通过非局域库珀对隧穿通道实现显著增强的二极管效率。即使在有限能隙的现实器件中，该结论仍然保持鲁棒性，为高性能超导二极管设计提供了新思路。

title: Micromotion area as proxy for anomalous Floquet topological systems
summary: Driven Floquet systems can realize topological phases with no static counterparts. These so-called anomalous Floquet topology breaks the bulk-boundary correspondence based on the Chern number. The number of edge modes in each band gap is instead determined by another integer index, a winding number, which is calculated from the time evolution operator of the bulk states within one driving period. While in the non-driven system, Chern markers provide a useful local proxy for the Chern number in the bulk, so far no such local bulk indicator is known for the winding number in Floquet systems. Here we consider two-band models and show that the area enclosed during a Floquet period by an initially localized particle signals the presence of an anomalous phase when it approaches half the unit cell area. In general, we show that at the fine-tuned point of dispersionless dynamics during the micromotion, the enclosed area is quantized and an exact proportionality relation exists between the area and the winding number. Direct detection of anomalous topology in real space could be realized in several quantum simulation platforms, and could be useful for systems with disorder or interactions. Building on the connection between area and winding number, we also show a way to realize arbitrarily high winding numbers.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过测量局域粒子在Floquet周期内扫过的面积来检测反常Floquet拓扑的新方法，建立了面积与拓扑绕数之间的比例关系。
AI.motivation: 反常Floquet拓扑系统打破了基于陈数的体边对应关系，目前缺乏像陈数标记那样的局域体指标来表征绕数。需要发展在实空间中直接检测反常拓扑的方法。
AI.method: 研究二带模型，通过分析初始局域粒子在Floquet周期内扫过的面积来探测反常拓扑。在微运动无色散的精细调节点，证明扫过的面积是量子化的，并与绕数存在精确比例关系。
AI.result: 当扫过的面积接近半个晶胞面积时，表明存在反常相。在无色散动力学条件下，面积被量子化且与绕数成正比。基于此关系，展示了实现任意高绕数的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为反常Floquet拓扑提供了首个局域体指标，可在实空间中直接检测，适用于无序或相互作用系统，并为实现高绕数拓扑相开辟了新途径。

title: Forster energy transfer boosts indirect anisotropic interlayer excitons in 2L-MoSe2/perovskite heterostructures
summary: Interlayer excitons (IXs) in two-dimensional (2D) van der Waals heterostructures have attracted considerable attention due to their unique optical and electronic properties. Owing to the spatially indirect nature, the radiative emission efficiency highly sensitive to interlayer twist angles. Further considering that their uniformly oriented out-of-plane dipole moments limit directional emission, strategies to simultaneously improve emission efficiency and induce optical anisotropy warrant in-depth investigation. In this work, we report significant photoluminescence (PL) enhancement and optical anisotropy of IXs in 2L-MoSe2/perovskite heterostructures mediated by energy transfer from ReS2. We attribute this enhancement to Forster resonance energy transfer (FRET), which increases the 2L-MoSe2 emission by approximately eight-fold at room temperature, and nearly doubles the emission intensity of momentum-indirect IXs in 2L-MoSe2/perovskite heterostructures at 78 K. Importantly, the optical anisotropy of ReS2 can be effectively imprinted onto 2L-MoSe2 and associated indirect IXs during the energy transfer process, yielding a linear dichroism of approximately 1.1 for both intralayer excitons and IXs with identical polarization directions. These findings expand the scope of IX study beyond direct bandgap materials with strong intrinsic emission to include systems with indirect bandgaps, offering new avenues for realizing high-performance polarization-sensitive optoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 通过ReS2介导的Förster共振能量转移，显著增强了2L-MoSe2/钙钛矿异质结构中层间激子的光致发光强度并诱导了光学各向异性
AI.motivation: 层间激子在二维范德华异质结构中具有独特的光电性质，但其辐射效率对层间扭转角高度敏感，且垂直偶极矩限制了定向发射。需要同时提高发射效率和诱导光学各向异性的策略
AI.method: 利用ReS2作为能量转移介质，通过Förster共振能量转移增强2L-MoSe2/钙钛矿异质结构中激子的发光，并将ReS2的光学各向异性转移到目标材料
AI.result: 室温下2L-MoSe2发射增强约8倍，78K下动量间接层间激子发射强度几乎翻倍；成功将ReS2的光学各向异性转移到2L-MoSe2和层间激子，实现约1.1的线性二向色性
AI.conclusion: 该研究将层间激子研究扩展到具有间接带隙的材料体系，为高性能偏振敏感光电器件提供了新途径

title: Prediction of new superconducting bilayers heterostructures using quantum confinement and proximity effects
summary: A central challenge in nanoscale superconductivity is to understand and exploit the combined action of quantum confinement and proximity effects in experimentally realistic metallic heterostructures. We theoretically investigate superconducting bilayer heterostructures in which these two effects coexist. Using a generalized Eliashberg framework that incorporates both quantum confinement and proximity coupling, we show that their interplay can substantially enhance the superconducting critical temperature. In particular, the theory predicts superconductivity in selected bilayers whose constituent materials are nonsuperconducting or only weakly superconducting in the bulk. These results identify quantum-confined bilayers as a promising route to engineering emergent superconductivity in metallic heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 量子限制与邻近效应协同作用可显著增强双层异质结构的超导临界温度，甚至使原本非超导或弱超导的材料组合实现超导。
AI.motivation: 纳米尺度超导性的核心挑战在于理解和利用量子限制与邻近效应在实际金属异质结构中的协同作用，这为工程化涌现超导性提供了新途径。
AI.method: 采用广义Eliashberg理论框架，该框架同时考虑了量子限制效应和邻近耦合效应，用于研究双层异质结构中的超导行为。
AI.result: 理论预测显示，量子限制与邻近效应的协同作用能显著提升超导临界温度，甚至在由非超导或弱超导材料组成的特定双层结构中诱导出超导性。
AI.conclusion: 量子限制双层结构是工程化金属异质结构中涌现超导性的有前景途径，为设计新型超导材料提供了理论指导。

title: Correlation-Driven Orbital Order Realizes 2D Metallic Altermagnetism
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, comments and suggestions are welcome
summary: Two-dimensional metallic altermagnets are rare, and no correlated 2D material has been established to host large nonrelativistic spin splitting. Here we show that spontaneous orbital order, driven by electronic correlations and Fermi surface nesting, provides a general microscopic route to two-dimensional metallic altermagnetism. Antiferro-orbital ordering between the d$_{xz}$ and d$_{yz}$ orbitals breaks the equivalence of magnetic sublattices with opposite spins and generates a symmetry-enforced altermagnetic spin texture. As a concrete realization, we identify monolayer YbMn$_2$Ge$_2$ as a stable correlated metallic altermagnet exhibiting giant nonrelativistic spin splitting of order 1 eV. The resulting phase supports an exceptionally large and gate-tunable transverse spin conductivity. These results establish correlation-driven orbital order as a robust and general mechanism for designing correlated altermagnets with large spin splitting.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出关联驱动的轨道有序是二维金属性交变磁体的通用微观机制，并以单层YbMn₂Ge₂为例展示了巨大的非相对论性自旋劈裂。
AI.motivation: 二维金属性交变磁体材料稀少，且尚未发现具有大非相对论性自旋劈裂的关联二维材料。需要探索新的微观机制来实现这种材料。
AI.method: 通过自发轨道有序机制，利用电子关联和费米面嵌套驱动d_{xz}和d_{yz}轨道之间的反铁磁轨道有序，打破相反自旋磁子晶格的等价性，产生对称性强制交变磁自旋纹理。
AI.result: 识别出单层YbMn₂Ge₂作为稳定的关联金属性交变磁体，具有约1 eV的巨大非相对论性自旋劈裂，支持异常大且可通过栅极调控的横向自旋电导率。
AI.conclusion: 关联驱动的轨道有序是设计具有大自旋劈裂的关联交变磁体的稳健通用机制，为二维金属性交变磁体材料开辟了新途径。

title: Dual migration modes of unfaulted disconnections on curved twin boundaries
summary: Grain boundary migration governs microstructural evolution in crystalline materials, directly influencing mechanical properties such as strength and thermal stability. Disconnections, which are line defects formed at grain boundaries in response to local curvature, have been identified as critical carriers of boundary migration. Here, we investigate the glide of unfaulted disconnections (UFDs) on a coherent twin boundary in aluminum at elevated temperatures using molecular dynamics simulations combined with the Nudged Elastic Band (NEB) method. Our results reveal a striking bifurcation in migration behavior depending on the disconnection core structure. UFDs with a pure edge Burgers vector migrate via a thermally activated double-kink mechanism, exhibiting a migration velocity that increases monotonically with temperature. In contrast, UFDs containing a screw dipole component possess an energy barrier approximately eight times lower, and their core structure undergoes a continuous transformation during glide, giving rise to stochastic, bidirectional motion with no systematic temperature dependence. These findings demonstrate that the disconnection core structure fundamentally dictates the migration mode and kinetics of twin boundaries, offering new mechanistic insights into disconnection-mediated grain boundary migration.

AI.tldr: 研究发现铝中孪晶界上未断层位错（UFDs）的迁移行为取决于其核心结构：纯刃型位错通过热激活双扭结机制迁移，速度随温度单调增加；而含螺型偶极分量的位错能垒低8倍，通过连续核心结构转变实现随机双向运动，无系统温度依赖性。
AI.motivation: 晶界迁移控制着晶体材料的微观结构演化，直接影响强度和热稳定性等力学性能。位错作为响应局部曲率在晶界形成的线缺陷，被认为是晶界迁移的关键载体。研究旨在揭示孪晶界上位错迁移的微观机制。
AI.method: 采用分子动力学模拟结合Nudged Elastic Band（NEB）方法，研究铝中相干孪晶界上未断层位错（UFDs）在高温下的滑移行为。
AI.result: 发现迁移行为存在显著分叉：纯刃型Burgers矢量的UFDs通过热激活双扭结机制迁移，迁移速度随温度单调增加；而含螺型偶极分量的UFDs能垒约低8倍，其核心结构在滑移过程中连续转变，产生随机双向运动，无系统温度依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 位错核心结构从根本上决定了孪晶界的迁移模式和动力学，为理解位错介导的晶界迁移提供了新的机制见解。

title: Tensor network methods for bound electron-hole complexes beyond strong and weak confinement in nanoplatelets
summary: In semiconductor nanostructures, optical excitation typically creates bound electron-hole states, such as excitons, trions, and larger complexes. Their relative motion is described by the Wannier equation, which is valid only for spatially extended motion in the Coulomb-dominated, weak-confinement limit. Other small nanostructures, such as quantum dots, are in the confinement-dominated strong confinement regime, where the wavefunction factorizes into independent electron and hole parts. Nanoplatelets are in between the two regimes and require solving an unfactorized higher-dimensional Schrödinger equation, which is computationally expensive. This work demonstrates how tensor networks can partially overcome this problem, using CdSe nanoplatelets as an example. The method is also applicable to related two-dimensional systems. As a demonstration, we calculate the excitonic and trionic ground states, as well as several excited states, for nanoplatelets of varying sizes, including their energies and oscillator strengths. More importantly, overall strategies for using tensor networks in real space for systems under intermediate confinement have been developed.

AI.tldr: 使用张量网络方法解决纳米片中间限制区域的激子和三子态计算问题，克服传统方法计算成本高的限制。
AI.motivation: 纳米片处于弱限制（库仑主导）和强限制（限制主导）之间的中间限制区域，需要求解未分解的高维薛定谔方程，传统方法计算成本极高。
AI.method: 采用张量网络方法，以CdSe纳米片为例，在实空间中构建计算框架，适用于中间限制区域的二维系统。
AI.result: 成功计算了不同尺寸纳米片的激子和三子基态及多个激发态，包括能量和振荡强度，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 张量网络方法能够有效解决中间限制区域的量子态计算问题，为相关二维系统提供了实用的计算策略。

title: Effect of Pb doping on the crystallization process and thermoelectric properties of Ge2Sb2Te5 phase change material
summary: Phase change materials based on Ge-Sb-Te alloys are widely explored for their potential in both memory devices and thermoelectric applications. In this study, films of Ge2Sb2Te5 (GST) doped with varying concentrations of Pb were prepared and systematically investigated to trace the effect of Pb doping on crystallization-induced phase transformations and thermoelectric properties. Via X-ray diffraction and Raman spectroscopy, the impact of Pb doping on the crystallization behavior was revealed and examined. According to the specific electrical resistivity measurements, the Pb doping resulted in decreasing both the amorphous-to-cubic and cubic-to-hexagonal transition temperatures, thereby facilitating the formation of the hexagonal phase at a lower thermal regime. Furthermore, Seebeck coefficient and electrical resistivity data of hexagonal Pb-doped GST were used to calculate the power factor, PF. A PF maximum equal to 1.3 was found for 2.5 at. Pb-GST at 633 K, with the highest carrier mobility also observed for this composition. Controlled Pb doping effectively modulates both structural transitions and thermoelectric performance, highlighting the potential of Pb-GST for applications that combine phase-change memory and thermoelectric functionality, such as opto-thermoelectric devices and non-volatile thermoelectric sensors.

AI.tldr: 研究Pb掺杂对Ge2Sb2Te5相变材料的结构转变和热电性能的影响，发现Pb掺杂能降低相变温度并优化热电性能
AI.motivation: Ge-Sb-Te合金相变材料在存储器件和热电应用中具有潜力，但需要优化其性能。本研究旨在探索Pb掺杂如何调控GST材料的相变行为和热电性能，为开发兼具相变存储和热电功能的应用提供基础。
AI.method: 制备不同Pb掺杂浓度的Ge2Sb2Te5薄膜，通过X射线衍射和拉曼光谱分析结晶行为，测量电阻率确定相变温度，利用塞贝克系数和电阻率数据计算功率因子。
AI.result: Pb掺杂降低了非晶-立方和立方-六方相变温度，促进了低温下六方相的形成。2.5 at.% Pb-GST在633K时获得最大功率因子1.3，同时具有最高的载流子迁移率。
AI.conclusion: 可控的Pb掺杂能有效调控GST的结构转变和热电性能，Pb-GST在结合相变存储和热电功能的应用中具有潜力，如光热电器件和非易失性热电传感器。

title: Topology of honeycomb nanoribbons revisited
summary: We present an in-depth study of end states in honeycomb nanoribbons, focusing on the interplay between nanoribbon termination, chiral symmetry, and complex next-nearest-neighbor hopping in the framework of the Haldane model. Although previous work has identified zero-dimensional end states in such systems, this analysis is incomplete. Here, we systematically investigate zigzag and armchair nanoribbons of various widths, using the multiband Zak phase to characterize the topological properties of the occupied bands. We show that the Zak phase is quantized only for certain ribbon terminations, and we elucidate how this termination dependence governs the existence and robustness of end states. Furthermore, we explore the effect of varying the complex next-nearest-neighbor hopping phase, demonstrating the breakdown of chiral symmetry, the evolution of the bulk gap, and the resulting depinning of end-state energies. Finally, we place our findings in the context of previous studies and discuss connections to the Kane-Mele model, including the role of Rashba spin-orbit coupling. Our work provides a more detailed analysis of topological end states in nanoribbons described by the Haldane and Kane-Mele models and offers a framework for their characterization in related systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究深入分析了蜂窝状纳米带中的末端态，重点关注纳米带终止方式、手性对称性和复杂次近邻跃迁之间的相互作用，使用多带Zak相表征占据能带的拓扑性质。
AI.motivation: 虽然先前研究已经识别出此类系统中的零维末端态，但分析不够完整。需要系统研究不同宽度和终止方式的纳米带，阐明末端态的存在和鲁棒性机制。
AI.method: 系统研究不同宽度的锯齿型和扶手椅型纳米带，使用多带Zak相表征占据能带的拓扑性质，分析复杂次近邻跃迁相位变化对系统的影响。
AI.result: 发现Zak相仅在某些特定终止方式下才量子化，这种终止依赖性决定了末端态的存在和鲁棒性。复杂次近邻跃迁相位变化会导致手性对称性破缺、体隙演化以及末端态能量的解钉扎。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为Haldane和Kane-Mele模型描述的纳米带中的拓扑末端态提供了更详细的分析，并建立了一个用于表征相关系统的框架，同时讨论了与Kane-Mele模型的联系，包括Rashba自旋轨道耦合的作用。

title: Distinguishing apparent and hidden altermagnetism via uniaxial strain in $\mathrm{CsV_2Te_2O}$-family
summary: The hidden altermagnetism has been theoretically proposed and then experimentally confirmed in metal $\mathrm{Cs_{1-δ}V_2Te_2O}$, which exhibits two nearly degenerate ground-state magnetic configurations (C-type and G-type) corresponding respectively to apparent and hidden altermagnetism. Here, we propose that in-plane uniaxial strain can be utilized to distinguish apparent and hidden altermagnetism. Under uniaxial strain, apparent altermagnetism exhibits an obvious net magnetic moment, whereas hidden altermagnetism maintains zero net magnetic moment. The magnetic moment induced by uniaxial strain here, namely the piezomagnetic effect, differs from that in semiconductors, where strain must be applied first followed by carrier doping to generate net magnetism. First-principles calculations verify our proposal, revealing that the magnetic moment induced by uniaxial strain in C-type antiferromagnetic $\mathrm{CsV_2Te_2O}$ is much larger than that in the previously studied altermagnetic semiconductors. Furthermore, we also investigate the electronic state transitions of semiconductors featuring a crystal structure analogous to $\mathrm{CsV_2Te_2O}$ under uniaxial strain, and verify our proposal in specific material via first-principles calculations. Our work provides an experimentally feasible strategy to distinguish apparent and hidden altermagnetism in material $\mathrm{Cs_{1-δ}V_2Te_2O}$, and extends the physical implication of the piezomagnetic effect, which can be directly verified in experimentally synthesizable $\mathrm{KV_2Se_2O}$ and $\mathrm{Rb_{1-δ}V_2Te_2O}$.

AI.tldr: 通过面内单轴应变区分表观和隐藏交变磁性：应变下表观交变磁性产生明显净磁矩，而隐藏交变磁性保持零净磁矩
AI.motivation: Cs₁₋δV₂Te₂O材料中存在两种近简并的基态磁构型（C型和G型），分别对应表观和隐藏交变磁性，需要实验上可区分的方法来识别这两种磁性状态
AI.method: 提出利用面内单轴应变作为区分机制，通过第一性原理计算验证：在C型反铁磁CsV₂Te₂O中计算应变诱导的磁矩，并与先前研究的交变磁性半导体进行比较；同时研究具有类似晶体结构的半导体在单轴应变下的电子态转变
AI.result: 单轴应变下表观交变磁性产生明显净磁矩（压磁效应），而隐藏交变磁性保持零净磁矩；C型反铁磁CsV₂Te₂O中应变诱导的磁矩远大于先前研究的交变磁性半导体；在KV₂Se₂O和Rb₁₋δV₂Te₂O等可实验合成的材料中验证了该机制
AI.conclusion: 提供了一种实验上可行的策略来区分Cs₁₋δV₂Te₂O材料中的表观和隐藏交变磁性，扩展了压磁效应的物理含义，为交变磁性材料的实验表征提供了新方法

title: Puiseux series about exceptional singularities dictated by symmetry-allowed Hessenberg forms of perturbation matrices
summary: We develop a systematic framework for determining the nature of exceptional points of $n^{\rm th}$ order (EP$_n$s) in non-Hermitian (NH) systems, represented by complex square matrices. By expressing symmetry-preserving perturbations in the Jordan-normal basis of the defective matrix at an EP$_n$, we show that the upper-$k$ Hessenberg structure of the perturbation directly dictates the leading-order eigenvalue- and eigenvector-splitting to be $\propto ε^{1/k}$, when expanded in a Puiseux series. Applying this to three-band NH models invariant under parity (P), charge-conjugation (C), or parity-time-reversal (PT), we find that EP$_3$s in P- and C-symmetric systems are restricted to at most $\sim ε^{1/2}$ branch points, while PT-symmetric systems generically support EP$_3$s with the strongest possible singularities (viz. $\sim ε^{1/3}$). We illustrate these results with concrete three-dimensional models in which exceptional curves and surfaces emerge. We further show that fine-tuned perturbations can suppress the leading-order branch point to a less-singular splitting, which have implications for designing direction-dependent EP-based sensors. The appendix extends the analysis to four-band C- and P-symmetric models, establishing the existence of EP$_4$s with $\sim ε^{1/4}$ singularities.

AI.tldr: 提出系统框架分析非厄米系统中n阶例外点(EP_n)的性质，通过约当标准基和Hessenberg结构揭示特征值分裂与扰动参数ε的幂次关系，并在三带和四带模型中验证不同对称性下的奇异行为。
AI.motivation: 非厄米系统中的例外点(EPs)具有独特的奇异行为，但高阶例外点(EP_n)的性质缺乏系统理解。需要建立统一框架来分析不同对称性下EP_n的奇异行为及其对扰动的响应。
AI.method: 在例外点的约当标准基中表示对称保持扰动，利用扰动的上k-Hessenberg结构分析特征值和特征向量的Puiseux级数展开。应用于三带非厄米模型（P、C、PT对称），并扩展到四带模型。
AI.result: P和C对称系统中的EP_3最多具有ε^{1/2}阶分支点，而PT对称系统支持最强的ε^{1/3}奇异点。精细调节的扰动可抑制主导阶分支点，实现方向依赖的EP传感器设计。四带C和P对称模型存在ε^{1/4}奇异性的EP_4。
AI.conclusion: 建立了分析非厄米系统高阶例外点的系统框架，揭示了对称性对奇异行为的关键影响，为设计基于例外点的传感器提供了理论基础。

title: Decoding the Electronic and Structural Fingerprints of Single-Atom Catalysts via DFT-Assisted XANES Analysis
summary: Single-atom catalysts (SACs), composed of isolated metal atoms dispersed on solid supports, represent the ultimate expression of atomic efficiency in catalysis. Their remarkable activity and selectivity arise from local coordination environments and adjustable oxidation states, yet precise determination of these features remains an enduring challenge. Among modern characterization techniques, X-ray absorption near-edge structure (XANES) spectroscopy stands out for its sensitivity to both electronic and geometric structure, though its interpretation is often constrained by empirical comparison with bulk references. Here we introduce a density functional theory (DFT) based computational spectroscopy framework for the quantitative interpretation of Cu K-edge XANES spectra. We then employ this framework to reveal the oxidation state, coordination geometry, and hydration environment of Cu single atoms supported on cyanographene, demonstrating direct correspondence between spectral signatures and atomic-scale structure. This methodology establishes a robust and transferable route for connecting XANES features with the underlying electronic and structural characteristics of SACs, thereby advancing the rational design of atomically precise catalysts.

AI.tldr: 开发基于DFT的计算光谱框架，用于定量解释Cu K-edge XANES光谱，揭示Cu单原子催化剂的氧化态、配位几何和水合环境
AI.motivation: 单原子催化剂具有优异的活性和选择性，但其局部配位环境和氧化态的精确测定仍存在挑战。XANES光谱对此敏感，但解释常受限于与块体参考的经验比较
AI.method: 引入基于密度泛函理论的计算光谱框架，用于Cu K-edge XANES光谱的定量解释，并应用于氰化石墨烯负载的Cu单原子催化剂
AI.result: 成功揭示了Cu单原子的氧化态、配位几何和水合环境，证明了光谱特征与原子尺度结构的直接对应关系
AI.conclusion: 该方法为连接XANES特征与单原子催化剂的基础电子和结构特性建立了稳健且可转移的途径，推动了原子精确催化剂的理性设计

title: Magnetic field Controlled Anderson Delocalization in a Spinful Non-Hermitian Chain
summary: Anderson localization (AL) and the non-Hermitian skin effect (NHSE) represent two paradigmatic localization phenomena driven, respectively, by disorder and non-Hermiticity. In one-dimensional (1D) non-Hermitian systems, these factors are known to compete and provide a smooth crossover between AL and NHSE upon parameter tuning. Here, we show that this interplay is fundamentally enriched in spinful systems, where an external magnetic field acts as an additional degree to manipulate the localization behavior. By investigating a disordered 1D spinful non-Hermitian chain, we demonstrate that under appropriately correlated disorder configurations across spin sectors, the magnetic field enhances the AL $\rightarrow$ NHSE crossover. Interestingly, this facilitates the Anderson delocalization transition even in strongly disordered systems where states would otherwise be Anderson localized. By analyzing the inverse participation ratio and the mean center of mass, we map the resulting triple interplay between disorder, non-Hermiticity, and the magnetic field strength, identifying regimes of Anderson localization and skin accumulation. We further reveal that this magnetic field driven delocalization phenomenon originates from an effective suppression of disorder strength via Zeeman-induced inter-chain coupling across the spin sectors.

AI.tldr: 磁场可以调控自旋非厄米系统中无序、非厄米性和磁场之间的三重相互作用，实现安德森局域化到非厄米趋肤效应的转变，甚至在强无序系统中诱导退局域化。
AI.motivation: 研究在自旋系统中，磁场如何作为额外自由度来调控安德森局域化与非厄米趋肤效应之间的相互作用。传统一维非厄米系统中，无序和非厄米性之间的竞争已为人所知，但在自旋系统中，磁场可能带来新的物理现象。
AI.method: 研究一维无序自旋非厄米链，分析自旋通道间适当相关无序配置下磁场的作用。通过计算逆参与率和平均质心位置，映射无序、非厄米性和磁场强度之间的三重相互作用，识别安德森局域化和趋肤积累区域。
AI.result: 磁场增强了安德森局域化到非厄米趋肤效应的转变，甚至在强无序系统中促进安德森退局域化转变。磁场驱动的退局域化现象源于塞曼诱导的自旋通道间耦合有效抑制了无序强度。
AI.conclusion: 磁场作为关键调控参数，在自旋非厄米系统中能够显著改变无序和非厄米性之间的相互作用，实现从安德森局域化到非厄米趋肤效应的可控转变，揭示了磁场诱导退局域化的新机制。

title: Pulsed Laser Template Engineering- PLATEN
summary: Thin films of functional inorganic materials, particularly oxides, play a vital role in optoelectronics, enabling applications that range from active optical components to MEMS-based architectures. Achieving high aspect ratio patterning of these functional materials remains a significant challenge, as many of their constituent elements do not readily form volatile compounds required for conventional reactive ion etch processes. We introduce a novel approach, Pulsed Laser Template ENgineering (PLATEN), which offers a more accessible route for patterning materials that are typically difficult to etch. This technique involves depositing functional films using the Pulsed Laser Deposition (PLD) process onto silicon substrates that have been pre-patterned using reactive ion etching to create high aspect ratio features. Due to the highly forward-directed nature of the PLD process, the deposited films replicate closely the topography of the patterned silicon, without coatings the sidewalls. This process remains effective even at feature sizes down to approximately 50 nm. The oxide films replicate the underlying silicon pattern to a thickness of 80 nm. For thickness beyond 80 nm the patterns develop a waist at the midpoint which scales with film thickness and is not dependent on the feature size. In this paper, we present a detailed analysis of the PLATEN process, including deviations from ideal pattern replication in sub-micron features as a function of film thickness, and demonstrate near single crystalline growth of oxides on the patterned silicon substrate, demonstrating the potential of PLATEN technique for active opto-electronic materials.

AI.tldr: PLATEN是一种新型薄膜图案化技术，利用脉冲激光沉积在预图案化硅衬底上制备高深宽比功能氧化物薄膜，避免了传统刻蚀难题。
AI.motivation: 功能无机材料（特别是氧化物）薄膜在光电子应用中至关重要，但这些材料的许多组成元素难以形成挥发性化合物，使得传统反应离子刻蚀方法难以实现高深宽比图案化。
AI.method: PLATEN技术结合了反应离子刻蚀预图案化硅衬底和脉冲激光沉积（PLD）工艺。首先通过反应离子刻蚀在硅衬底上创建高深宽比特征，然后利用PLD的高度定向沉积特性，使氧化物薄膜紧密复制硅衬底的形貌而不覆盖侧壁。
AI.result: 该技术可在约50纳米特征尺寸下有效工作，氧化物薄膜能复制80纳米厚度的硅图案。超过80纳米时，图案会在中点形成与薄膜厚度相关的"腰部"，但与特征尺寸无关。研究展示了在图案化硅衬底上近乎单晶的氧化物生长。
AI.conclusion: PLATEN技术为难以刻蚀的材料提供了一种更易实现的图案化途径，在活性光电子材料领域具有重要应用潜力，特别是在亚微米特征尺寸下的图案复制和晶体生长方面表现出色。

title: Anomalous thermoelectric Hall response of interacting 2D Dirac fermions
summary: We study the anomalous thermoelectric Hall response of two-dimensional massive Dirac fermions to first order in the electron-electron interaction. We compute both the Nernst response to a Luttinger-type gravitational potential and the particle magnetization, the latter being required to remove spurious non-transport contributions. We show that, for arbitrary interactions, the magnetization is described by a remarkably simple formula. Surprisingly, and contrary to expectations, subtracting the magnetization currents does not make the thermoelectric Hall coefficient vanish in the zero-temperature limit. We attribute this to violation of locality on the smallest length scales, which is inevitable in a quantized field theory, that happens to manifest itself in infrared physics.

AI.tldr: 研究二维大质量狄拉克费米子在一阶电子-电子相互作用下的反常热电霍尔响应，发现减去磁化电流后热电霍尔系数在零温极限下并不为零，这源于量子场论中不可避免的局域性破坏。
AI.motivation: 研究二维大质量狄拉克费米子的反常热电霍尔响应，特别关注电子-电子相互作用的影响，以及如何正确计算输运系数。
AI.method: 计算Luttinger型引力势下的能斯特响应和粒子磁化，后者用于消除虚假的非输运贡献。推导出适用于任意相互作用的磁化公式。
AI.result: 发现磁化可以用一个极其简单的公式描述。令人惊讶的是，减去磁化电流后，热电霍尔系数在零温极限下并不为零，这与预期相反。
AI.conclusion: 热电霍尔系数的非零行为源于量子场论中不可避免的最小长度尺度上的局域性破坏，这种破坏在红外物理中显现出来。

title: Upcycling solar glass into Ce-doped oxyfluorides: spectroscopic and crystallization properties
summary: Oxyfluorides containing up to 80 wt% recycled glass from end-of-life solar panels have been investigated. Reduced processing temperature and high transparency have shown that the material has potential for optical applications. In this work, cerium-doped samples were investigated. Spectroscopic study reveals the presence of Ce$^{3+}$, and luminescence from these ions and oxygen-deficient centers was detected. Raman demonstrated that cerium affects the glass network by promoting polymerization. In turn, thermal analysis indicated some changes in the crystallization events between 500-800 $^o$ C, which were confirmed by in situ X-ray powder diffraction measurements. Crystallization of fluorite, xonotlite, and combeite was confirmed, while other phases give minor contributions to the XRD patterns. Cerium addition reduced the formation of xonotlite, mainly above 700 $^o$ C. The potential applications of the material and the further studies required are discussed.

AI.tldr: 利用废弃太阳能板玻璃制备含铈氧氟化物，研究其光学性能、结构变化和结晶行为，探讨光学应用潜力
AI.motivation: 研究利用废弃太阳能板回收玻璃制备光学材料，通过添加铈元素改善材料性能，探索环保且具有应用潜力的光学材料
AI.method: 制备含铈氧氟化物样品，使用光谱学分析Ce³⁺和氧缺陷中心，通过拉曼光谱研究铈对玻璃网络的影响，热分析和原位X射线衍射研究结晶行为
AI.result: 铈促进玻璃网络聚合，改变500-800°C结晶过程，减少xonotlite相形成，材料显示高透明度和发光性能，主要结晶相为萤石、xonotlite和combeite
AI.conclusion: 含铈氧氟化物具有光学应用潜力，铈的添加改善了材料性能，但需要进一步研究以优化应用

title: Single Atom Magnets on Thermally Stable Adsorption Sites: Dy on NaCl(100)
comment: Main: 9 pages, 4 figures. Supplement: 15 pages, 11 figures, 10 tables
summary: We report magnetic bistability in single Dy atoms on NaCl(100) thin films. Individual Dy atoms substituting Na at the surface of the NaCl layer are thermally stable up to at least 300 K, display $4f^{9}$ occupancy, out-of-plane easy magnetization axis, and long spin relaxation time $T_1$ of about 10 s at 2.5 K; thereby they are the first single atom magnet on a thermally stable adsorption site. Dy atoms adsorbed onto the Cl and bridge sites display $4f^{10}$ occupancy. Dy on top-Cl exhibit magnetic hysteresis and a $T_1$ of 550 s at 0.3 T and 2.5 K. The observed slow magnetic relaxation of Dy on both adsorption sites introduces NaCl as an effective platform for single atom magnets.

AI.tldr: 在NaCl(100)薄膜上实现了单个Dy原子的磁双稳态，创造了首个在热稳定吸附位点上的单原子磁体
AI.motivation: 探索在热稳定吸附位点上实现单原子磁体的可能性，为单原子磁体研究提供新的平台
AI.method: 将单个Dy原子沉积在NaCl(100)薄膜上，研究不同吸附位点（Na替代位、Cl顶位、桥位）的磁性特性，测量自旋弛豫时间和磁滞回线
AI.result: Na替代位Dy原子热稳定性达300K，具有4f⁹占据和长自旋弛豫时间（10s，2.5K）；Cl顶位Dy原子显示4f¹⁰占据、磁滞现象和更长弛豫时间（550s，0.3T，2.5K）
AI.conclusion: NaCl是单原子磁体的有效平台，不同吸附位点的Dy原子表现出不同的磁性行为，为单原子磁体研究开辟了新途径

title: Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials for Predicting Physicochemical Properties of Molten Metal-Salt Systems for Calcium Electrolysis
summary: The design of efficient electrolysis devices for pure metal production requires accurate data on the properties of the melts used in the process. This work focuses on two key systems for calcium production: the molten Ca-Cu alloy and the CaCl$_2$-KCl electrolyte. High-temperature experiments are often expensive and time-consuming; however, we demonstrate that molecular dynamics (MD) simulations driven by machine-learned Moment Tensor Potentials (MTPs), trained on highly accurate density functional theory data, offer an effective and accurate alternative. Our MTP-driven MD simulations accurately reproduce the structural, thermodynamic, and transport properties across a range of temperatures and compositions relevant to electrolysis systems. We report calculated densities, radial distribution functions, heat capacities, thermal conductivities, ionic conductivities (for the electrolyte), viscosities, and diffusion coefficients, with deviations from experimental data within 20%. The strong agreement between calculations and experiments validates the proposed approach, establishing a robust framework for the computational exploration and optimization of liquid systems in metallurgical applications.

AI.tldr: 使用机器学习矩张量势驱动的分子动力学模拟准确预测钙生产相关熔体系统的结构、热力学和输运性质，为冶金应用提供计算框架。
AI.motivation: 高效电解设备设计需要准确的熔体性质数据，但高温实验成本高且耗时。需要开发准确的计算替代方法。
AI.method: 采用基于高精度密度泛函理论数据训练的机器学习矩张量势驱动分子动力学模拟，研究Ca-Cu合金和CaCl2-KCl电解质系统。
AI.result: 模拟准确再现了电解相关温度和组成范围内的结构、热力学和输运性质，包括密度、径向分布函数、热容、热导率、离子电导率、粘度和扩散系数，与实验数据偏差在20%以内。
AI.conclusion: 计算与实验的强一致性验证了该方法，为冶金应用中液体系统的计算探索和优化建立了稳健框架。

title: Self-thermometry measurements of the adiabatic temperature change in first-order phase transition magnetocaloric materials
comment: 16 pages, 4 figures. To be submitted for peer review
summary: Accurately measuring the magnetocaloric effect is necessary to foster the development of magnetic refrigeration devices. However, current methods are inconvenient, requiring different instruments to measure each individual property or a custom-made setup. By measuring the time-varying magnetization in a commercially available VersaLab\textsuperscript{\textregistered} PPMS\textsuperscript{\textregistered} from Quantum Design, we have determined the adiabatic temperature change ($Δ$T$_{\textrm{ad}}$) of the first-order phase transition material Gd$_5$Si$_2$Ge$_2$, for a magnetic field change of 0 to 1 T, under high vacuum ($<$ 0.1 mTorr). For each temperature and magnetic field, the equilibrium magnetization is used as the magnetization-to-temperature conversion curve, allowing us to extend the validity of a previously proposed technique to the first-order phase transition material Gd$_5$Si$_2$Ge$_2$, which exhibits significant hysteresis. Our method thus enables full characterization (magnetic entropy change, adiabatic temperature change, and heat capacity) of any magnetocaloric material, whether it has a first-order or a second-order phase transition, using a single instrument. Comparing to a directly measured $Δ$T$_{\textrm{ad}}$, our method resulted in a peak $Δ$T$_{\textrm{ad}}$ value of 4.47 K, within 1\% of the directly measured value for a sample of the same composition.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种在商用VersaLab PPMS中测量磁热效应的方法，可同时获得磁熵变、绝热温度变化和热容，适用于一级和二级相变材料。
AI.motivation: 当前测量磁热效应的方法不方便，需要不同仪器测量各个性质或定制设备，限制了磁制冷设备的发展。
AI.method: 在商用VersaLab PPMS中测量时间变化的磁化强度，利用平衡磁化作为磁化-温度转换曲线，扩展了先前技术到一级相变材料Gd5Si2Ge2。
AI.result: 对于0-1T磁场变化，测得Gd5Si2Ge2的绝热温度变化峰值ΔTad为4.47K，与直接测量值误差在1%以内。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可在单一仪器中完全表征任何磁热材料（一级或二级相变），为磁制冷设备开发提供了便利的测量手段。

title: Martensitic-like transition between liquid crystalline and crystalline phases of prototypical discotic organic semiconductor
comment: Main article: 19 pages, Supplementary Information: 14 pages. Main figures: 7, Article type: Original Research Article
summary: Phase transitions between crystalline solids occur either through the nucleation and growth mechanism, a process that is slow and destructive or through the diffusion-less and order preserving Martensitic route. In both organic and inorganic materials, Martensitic transformations are known to occur only between phases with crystalline symmetry. We demonstrate here that for canonical discotic organic semiconductor HAT6, the transition between the liquid crystalline columnar hexagonal phase (ColH) and the crystalline solid can occur through a mechanism that exhibits the hallmarks of Martensitic transformations: orientational correlations between parent and daughter phases, structural reversibility, and ultrafast kinetics. To access Martensitic-like solidification, the ColH phase of HAT6 is biaxially aligned in lithographically defined microchannels and crystallization is induced on deep supercooling. The transition mechanism is studied using a combination of polarized optical microscopy and X-ray scattering. At the largest accessible supercooling, the ColH - Crystal phase transition occurs at speeds of ~100 micrometer/s, a value that is seven orders of magnitude greater than the theoretical prediction for growth from isotropic melts. Our work suggests that Martensitic-like transformations can occur even between liquid crystals and crystals and are therefore more general than previously believed. Further, our work demonstrates that Martensitic-like transformations of anchored liquid crystals can be used to grow biaxially aligned crystals of organic molecules over arbitrarily long distances. As lattice alignment over large areas is desirable for devices like field-effect transistors and as several high-performance molecular semiconductors exhibit a ColH phase, our results hold general significance for organic electronics.

AI.tldr: 本文发现HAT6有机半导体的柱状六方液晶相向晶体相转变可通过类马氏体机制实现，具有取向关联、结构可逆和超快动力学特征，速度比理论预测快七个数量级。
AI.motivation: 传统相变机制（成核生长或马氏体转变）仅限于晶体相之间，本文探索液晶与晶体之间是否也能发生类马氏体转变，以实现在大范围内生长双轴取向的有机分子晶体，这对有机电子器件具有重要意义。
AI.method: 将HAT6的柱状六方液晶相在光刻定义的微通道中进行双轴取向排列，通过深度过冷诱导结晶，结合偏振光学显微镜和X射线散射研究相变机制。
AI.result: 在最大可达到的过冷度下，ColH-晶体相变速度可达~100微米/秒，比各向同性熔体生长理论预测快七个数量级；转变表现出母相与子相之间的取向关联、结构可逆性和超快动力学等马氏体转变特征。
AI.conclusion: 类马氏体转变可以发生在液晶与晶体之间，比先前认为的更普遍；通过锚定液晶的类马氏体转变可以在任意长距离上生长双轴取向的有机分子晶体，对具有柱状六方相的高性能分子半导体器件具有重要意义。

title: Berry curvature induced giant anomalous and spin texture driven Hall responses in the layered kagome antiferromagnet GdTi3Bi4
comment: Manuscript accepted in Phys. Rev. B (https://doi.org/10.1103/h8sf-m1zv)
summary: In recent years, layered kagome magnets have emerged as promising platforms for Berry-curvature engineering and unconventional transport phenomena. Here, we present the single-crystal growth, magnetization, and electrical transport characterizations of the van der Waals-like layered antiferromagnet GdTi3Bi4. The system exhibits pronounced field-induced first-order phase transitions. Comprehensive frequency, temperature, and field-dependent ac susceptibility measurements, and Hall analysis, reveals the formation of a spin-cluster-like glassy magnetic phase attributed to noncollinear spin textures. Additionally, the system demonstrates a colossal anomalous Hall conductivity σ_xy^{A}~ 8.6(7)10^{3} Ohm-1 cm-1 at 2 K). Detailed scaling analyses reveal the coexistence of skew scattering and intrinsic Berry-curvature contributions to the anomalous Hall effect. First-principles calculations highlight flat-band near the Fermi level, with f-electrons of the Gd ion contributing large intrinsic Hall response. Thus, GdTi3Bi4 emerges as a rare layered kagome magnet, exhibiting Berry curvature-induced giant anomalous and spin texture-driven Hall responses, providing a versatile platform for exploring spin-texture physics and advancing low-dimensional spintronic functionalities.

AI.tldr: GdTi3Bi4是一种层状kagome反铁磁体，表现出场诱导一级相变、自旋团簇玻璃态、巨反常霍尔效应（~8.6×10³ Ω⁻¹cm⁻¹），以及贝里曲率与偏斜散射共存的机制。
AI.motivation: 层状kagome磁体是贝里曲率工程和非传统输运现象的理想平台，但兼具巨反常霍尔效应和自旋纹理驱动响应的材料仍很罕见。本研究旨在探索GdTi3Bi4这一新型范德华层状反铁磁体的磁性和输运特性。
AI.method: 通过单晶生长、磁化强度测量、电输运表征，结合频率/温度/磁场依赖的交流磁化率测量和霍尔分析。采用第一性原理计算研究电子结构，并通过详细标度分析区分反常霍尔效应的不同贡献机制。
AI.result: 发现场诱导一级相变和自旋团簇玻璃态磁性相；在2K下获得巨反常霍尔电导率~8.6×10³ Ω⁻¹cm⁻¹；标度分析显示反常霍尔效应同时包含贝里曲率本征贡献和偏斜散射机制；第一性原理计算表明费米能级附近存在平带，Gd离子的f电子贡献大的本征霍尔响应。
AI.conclusion: GdTi3Bi4是一种罕见的层状kagome磁体，兼具贝里曲率诱导的巨反常霍尔效应和自旋纹理驱动的霍尔响应，为探索自旋纹理物理和发展低维自旋电子学功能提供了多功能平台。

title: Interfacial charge-transfer in 3d/5d complex oxide heterostructures
summary: Interfacial charge transfer (ICT) provides a powerful route to engineer electronic phases in correlated oxide heterostructures, yet predictive design principles remain elusive. Here, we systematically investigate superlattices composed of the 5d spin-orbit coupled semimetal SrIrO3 and a series of correlated 3d perovskites (LaMnO3, LaFeO3, LaCoO3, and NdNiO3), thereby establishing a quantitative framework for ICT across 3d/5d interfaces. Combining element-specific x-ray absorption spectroscopy with spatially resolved electron energy loss spectroscopy, a homogeneous electron transfer from the 5d to the 3d layers is directly quantified, reaching up to 0.35 e per unit cell in the cobaltate superlattice. We show that the magnitude of ICT scales linearly with the difference in electronegativity between the transition-metal oxide layers, identifying electronegativity-driven band alignment as the dominant mechanism for ICT. Beyond interfacial doping, we find that strong 3d-5d hybridization induces a complete low-spin to high-spin conversion in the cobaltate layers, demonstrating interface-controlled spin-state engineering without chemical substitution. These results establish electronegativity mismatch as a predictive design parameter for correlated oxide interfaces and provide a materials platform for tailoring band filling, orbital hierarchy, and spin configurations in quantum oxide heterostructures, paving the way towards advanced oxide electronics and next-generation information technologies.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过系统研究SrIrO3与多种3d过渡金属氧化物超晶格，建立了3d/5d界面电荷转移的定量框架，发现电荷转移量与电负性差呈线性关系，并实现了界面控制的钴酸盐自旋态工程。
AI.motivation: 界面电荷转移是调控关联氧化物异质结构电子相的有力途径，但目前缺乏预测性设计原则。研究旨在建立3d/5d氧化物界面电荷转移的定量框架，探索界面控制的电子相工程。
AI.method: 采用SrIrO3（5d自旋轨道耦合半金属）与一系列3d钙钛矿（LaMnO3、LaFeO3、LaCoO3、NdNiO3）构建超晶格，结合元素特异性X射线吸收光谱和空间分辨电子能量损失谱，直接量化界面电荷转移。
AI.result: 直接量化了从5d层到3d层的均匀电子转移，钴酸盐超晶格中最高达0.35e/晶胞。发现电荷转移量与过渡金属氧化物层之间的电负性差呈线性关系，表明电负性驱动的能带对齐是主要机制。强3d-5d杂化诱导钴酸盐层完全从低自旋态转变为高自旋态。
AI.conclusion: 电负性失配可作为关联氧化物界面的预测性设计参数，为调控量子氧化物异质结构中的能带填充、轨道层次和自旋构型提供了材料平台，推动先进氧化物电子学和下一代信息技术发展。

title: Charge and spin photogalvanic effects in the p-wave magnet NiI2
comment: 8 pages (main) + 18 pages (supporting information). 4 figures (main) + 14 figures (supporting information)
summary: NiI2 is an exotic van der Waals material in which a noncollinear spin spiral breaks spatial inversion symmetry without sizeable structural distortion, generating improper ferroelectric polarization, and stabilizing p-wave magnetic states with electron-volt-scale odd-parity spin splitting. Using first-principles calculations, here we establish that nonlinear optical transport can directly probe and separate these effects. Magnetically-induced inversion breaking associated with the spin spiral produces a photogalvanic shift current under linearly polarized light, with conductivities exceeding those of conventional ferroelectrics. In contrast, a large photogalvanic injection current under circularly polarized light originates from helicity-selective transitions between spin-split states at opposite crystal momenta, directly exposing the nonrelativistic p-wave spin texture. We further predict pure spin photocurrents whose flow direction exchanges with that of the charge current under linear and circular excitation. The ability to generate and control pure spin currents without accompanying charge currents makes NiI2 a promising material platform for all-optical spin injection in van der Waals heterostructures.

AI.tldr: NiI2是一种具有非共线自旋螺旋的范德华材料，能产生反常铁电极化和eV尺度奇宇称自旋劈裂。非线性光学输运可直接探测这些效应，包括线性偏振光下的光电流和圆偏振光下的注入电流，并能产生纯自旋电流。
AI.motivation: 研究NiI2这种具有非共线自旋螺旋的范德华材料，探索如何利用非线性光学输运直接探测其独特的磁电性质，包括反常铁电极化和p波自旋纹理，并实现纯自旋电流的生成和控制。
AI.method: 使用第一性原理计算，分析NiI2在非线性光学输运中的行为，包括线性偏振光下的光电流响应和圆偏振光下的注入电流，研究自旋螺旋导致的对称性破缺效应。
AI.result: 自旋螺旋产生的磁致反演破缺导致线性偏振光下产生光电流，电导率超过传统铁电体；圆偏振光下的大注入电流源于自旋劈裂态之间的螺旋选择性跃迁，直接暴露p波自旋纹理；预测了线性/圆偏振激发下可产生纯自旋电流。
AI.conclusion: 非线性光学输运可直接探测NiI2的磁电性质，该材料能产生和调控纯自旋电流，无需伴随电荷电流，是范德华异质结构中全光学自旋注入的有前景平台。

title: Anisotropic light-electron-phonon coupling and ultrafast carrier separation in ferroelectric BaTiO$_3$
summary: Ferroelectric materials with built-in electric fields are useful for ultrafast electronics and solar cells. Using ultrafast electron diffraction, we here report that ferroelectric BaTiO$_3$ reacts to light with a polarization-sensitive electron-phonon coupling. Excited electrons relax faster into phonons and temperature when the optical electric field aligns to the ferroelectric polarization. Also, ultrafast electron electrometry visualizes the motion of photo-excited electron-hole pairs in presence of the ferroelectric field.

AI.tldr: 通过超快电子衍射研究铁电BaTiO₃的光响应，发现光激发电子弛豫速率与光电场和铁电极化方向的对齐程度相关，并可视化光生电子-空穴对在铁电场中的运动。
AI.motivation: 铁电材料具有内建电场，在超快电子学和太阳能电池中具有应用潜力。然而，铁电材料对光的响应机制，特别是光激发载流子在铁电场中的动力学行为尚不清楚。
AI.method: 使用超快电子衍射技术研究BaTiO₃的光响应，通过偏振敏感的光激发探测电子-声子耦合；同时利用超快电子电测法可视化光生电子-空穴对在铁电场中的运动。
AI.result: 当光电场与铁电极化方向对齐时，激发电子更快地弛豫到声子和温度中；超快电子电测法成功可视化了光生电子-空穴对在铁电场中的运动轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 铁电BaTiO₃表现出偏振敏感的光响应特性，光电场与铁电极化的对齐程度影响电子弛豫动力学，这为设计基于铁电材料的超快光电器件提供了新见解。

title: Atomic-Scale Insights into Copper Corrosion in Acidic Environment through Cryogenic Atom Probe Tomography of 3D-Electrodeposited Microcorrosion Cell
summary: Corrosion originates from atomistic reactions occurring at dynamic solid liquid interfaces; however, direct experimental observation of these reactions has remained elusive due to the inability to preserve transient interfacial states during characterization. To refine corrosion models, advanced techniques capable of analyzing corrosion interfaces at the atomic scale are essential. Recent advancements in cryogenic atom probe tomography (cryoAPT) enabled 3D nanoscale analysis of frozen liquid metal interfaces. However, challenges remain in sample preparation for cryoAPT on metals undergoing corrosion. This study introduces a microcorrosion cell fabricated using localized electrodeposition in liquid (LEL), enabling atomic scale capture of liquid metal reactions by integrating picoliter scale electrolytes encapsulated within sealed metallic microvessels, subsequently analyzed using cryoAPT. This approach enables 3D, nanoscale mapping of corrosion reactions with simultaneous spatial, chemical, and temporal resolution. As a model system, copper exposed to aerated dilute sulfuric acid reveals temperature and time dependent interfacial evolution, including nanoscale clustering of copper sulfate species, enhanced ion pairing at elevated temperature, and the emergence of transient carbon based interfacial complexes inaccessible to conventional characterization methods. Beyond copper corrosion, the presented microcorrosion cell architecture establishes a strategy for interrogating confined electrochemical and degradation processes across a wide range of material liquid systems, using a combination of microfabrication and cryoAPT.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一种基于局部电沉积的微腐蚀电池，结合冷冻原子探针层析技术，实现了对金属-液体界面腐蚀反应的原子级三维观测。
AI.motivation: 腐蚀源于固体-液体界面的原子级反应，但由于无法在表征过程中保持瞬态界面状态，直接实验观测这些反应一直很困难。为了改进腐蚀模型，需要能够在原子尺度分析腐蚀界面的先进技术。
AI.method: 采用局部电沉积在液体中（LEL）制备微腐蚀电池，将皮升级电解质封装在密封的金属微容器内，然后使用冷冻原子探针层析技术（cryoAPT）进行分析。这种方法能够实现腐蚀反应的三维纳米级映射，同时提供空间、化学和时间分辨率。
AI.result: 以铜在含氧稀硫酸中的腐蚀为模型系统，揭示了温度和时间的依赖界面演化：包括硫酸铜物种的纳米级聚集、高温下增强的离子配对，以及传统表征方法无法检测到的瞬态碳基界面复合物的出现。
AI.conclusion: 这种微腐蚀电池架构为研究各种材料-液体系统中的受限电化学和降解过程提供了新策略，结合微加工和冷冻原子探针层析技术，能够实现原子尺度的界面反应观测。

title: Molecular dynamics study of the role of anisotropy in radiation-driven embrittlement
summary: This study investigates the influence of crystallographic orientation on fracture behavior and the resulting mechanical anisotropy in a Fe55Ni19Cr26 alloy crystal containing radiation-induced defects, using molecular dynamics (MD) simulations. Crack propagation is analyzed in irradiated samples with three selected high-symmetry crystallographic orientations to show how radiation-induced defects modify local deformation mechanisms and amplify mechanical anisotropy. The investigation focuses on the anisotropic nature of the ductile-to-brittle transition (DBT) driven by radiation-induced defects by simulating fracture behavior under tensile loading. Fracture resistance is quantitatively evaluated using a traction-separation (T-S) approach to extract the atomic-scale fracture energy under realistic defect conditions. The results reveal a strong crystallographic orientation dependence in the evolution of deformation and fracture behavior during DBT. The crystal lattice orientation governs dislocation activity and defect interactions, which in turn regulate local plasticity mechanisms, strain localization, slip system activation, and fracture resistance, thereby driving the development and enhancement of mechanical anisotropy in irradiated materials. It is further shown that radiation-induced embrittlement cannot be explained solely by defect accumulation, but rather by orientation-sensitive interactions among dislocations, defects, and fracture process zones. A key novelty of this work lies in integrating radiation-induced defect evolution with orientation-dependent fracture within an atomistic T-S analysis, enabling quantitative assessment of atomic-scale fracture resistance under realistic defect conditions.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分子动力学模拟，分析了Fe55Ni19Cr26合金晶体中辐射诱导缺陷对断裂行为和力学各向异性的影响，重点关注晶体取向对韧脆转变的调控作用。
AI.motivation: 研究辐射诱导缺陷如何影响材料的断裂行为和力学各向异性，特别是晶体取向在调控局部变形机制和韧脆转变中的作用，以深入理解辐射脆化的微观机制。
AI.method: 采用分子动力学模拟，在含辐射诱导缺陷的Fe55Ni19Cr26合金晶体中，选择三种高对称性晶体取向进行裂纹扩展分析，通过拉伸加载模拟断裂行为，使用牵引-分离方法定量评估原子尺度断裂能。
AI.result: 结果显示断裂行为和变形演化具有强烈的晶体取向依赖性。晶体取向调控位错活动和缺陷相互作用，进而影响局部塑性机制、应变局域化、滑移系激活和断裂抗力，从而增强辐射材料的力学各向异性。辐射脆化不能仅用缺陷积累解释，而是取向敏感的位错、缺陷和断裂过程区相互作用的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作的关键创新在于将辐射诱导缺陷演化与取向依赖断裂结合在原子尺度牵引-分离分析中，能够在实际缺陷条件下定量评估原子尺度断裂抗力，为理解辐射材料的力学各向异性提供了新视角。

title: Growth and Kerr magnetometry of Mn2Au on a gold-capped Nb(001) substrate
summary: We report on the epitaxial growth of antiferromagnetic Mn2Au on a Nb(001) substrate capped with a pseudomorphic layer of gold. We observe a layer-by-layer growth by means of medium-energy electron diffraction and confirm stoichiometry and surface structure by Auger electron spectroscopy and low-energy electron diffraction. Evaporation of 15 ML of ferromagnetic Fe on 12--17 ML of Mn2Au results in an exchange-coupled bilayer system with an exchange-bias shift that can be set by field-cooling from 400 K. Areas with and without exchange bias, with domain sizes in the range of tens of μm, are identified by Kerr microscopy. Postannealing the sample at or above 450 K after Mn2Au layer growth decreases the amount of areas where Fe magnetically couples to Mn2Au. We conclude that exchange coupling to an interfacial Fe layer depends on the interface termination of Mn2Au. Our findings provide insight into the growth process of Mn2Au and the coupling to an Fe layer. Our results point out the importance of growth, interface quality and termination on the magnetic properties of a Mn2Au/Fe bilayer which may help to improve material properties for spintronic applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在Nb(001)衬底上外延生长反铁磁Mn2Au，并研究其与铁磁Fe层的交换耦合行为，发现界面终止对交换偏置效应有重要影响。
AI.motivation: 研究Mn2Au/Fe双层系统的生长过程和磁耦合特性，以改善自旋电子学应用的材料性能。
AI.method: 在Nb(001)衬底上外延生长Mn2Au，用金层覆盖，然后沉积铁磁Fe层形成双层系统。使用中等能量电子衍射、俄歇电子能谱、低能电子衍射和克尔显微镜等技术进行表征。
AI.result: 观察到层状生长模式，Mn2Au/Fe双层系统表现出可通过场冷却设置的交换偏置效应。发现交换耦合区域与非耦合区域共存，且界面终止对耦合有重要影响。450K以上退火会减少Fe与Mn2Au的磁耦合区域。
AI.conclusion: Mn2Au/Fe双层系统的磁性能强烈依赖于生长条件、界面质量和界面终止，这些发现有助于优化自旋电子学器件的材料设计。

title: Interfacial Polytype Engineering of Polymer-Derived SiC via Compositionally Complex MXene Templating
summary: Controlling polytype selection in polymer-derived silicon carbide (SiC) remains challenging since stacking sequences are determined locally at the nucleation front. Here, we demonstrate an interface-driven strategy to bias SiC polytype evolution by introducing compositionally complex TiVCrMoC3 MXene nanosheets at the preceramic stage. Under spark plasma sintering (1900 C, 70 MPa), which typically stabilizes cubic beta-SiC, the MXene partially transforms into multicomponent carbide structures and generates two distinct heterogeneous interfacial states: reconstructed carbide/SiC interfaces that locally disrupt stacking sequences and promote hexagonal ordering, driving the emergence of alpha-SiC; and coherent MXene/SiC interfaces that preserve cubic stacking. Mechanical testing further reveals peak performance at an optimal MXene loading where interfacial reconstruction is most pronounced, with an around 82% increase in Young's modulus and 42% improvement in fracture toughness. These findings highlight interfacial polytype engineering via two-dimensional carbide templates as a promising route for directing crystal structure evolution in polymer-derived ceramics.

AI.tldr: 通过引入TiVCrMoC3 MXene纳米片，在聚合物衍生SiC中实现界面驱动的多型选择控制，显著提升力学性能
AI.motivation: 聚合物衍生碳化硅（SiC）的多型选择控制具有挑战性，因为堆垛序列在成核前沿局部决定。需要开发新策略来调控SiC多型演化
AI.method: 在预陶瓷阶段引入成分复杂的TiVCrMoC3 MXene纳米片，通过放电等离子烧结（1900°C, 70 MPa）处理。MXene部分转化为多组分碳化物结构，产生两种不同的异质界面状态：重建的碳化物/SiC界面和共格的MXene/SiC界面
AI.result: MXene的引入成功调控了SiC多型演化：重建界面促进六方有序化（α-SiC），共格界面保持立方堆垛（β-SiC）。在最佳MXene负载量下，杨氏模量增加约82%，断裂韧性提高42%
AI.conclusion: 通过二维碳化物模板进行界面多型工程是指导聚合物衍生陶瓷晶体结构演化的有前景途径，为控制陶瓷材料的多型选择提供了新策略

title: Electrostatic Photoluminescence Tuning in All-Solid-State Perovskite Transistors
summary: We demonstrate an all solid state semiconductor device, based on epitaxial single crystalline metal halide perovskites, enabling reversible control of a perovskite photoluminescence with a gate voltage. Fundamentally distinct from electroluminescent diodes, such a photoluminescence field effect transistor uses the gate electric field to electrostatically modulate the interfacial density of mobile charges, thereby affecting the radiative and nonradiative recombination channels of photocarriers. Varying the gate voltage in such transistors efficiently changes the rate of nonradiative interfacial recombination and modulates the photoluminescence intensity by 65 to 98 percent (depending on temperature). At favorable gating, nearly complete elimination of non-radiative losses can be achieved. This functionality, coupled with the strong visible-range absorption and emission, possible due to the high absorption coefficient, as well as controllable thickness and macroscopically homogeneous morphology of epitaxial perovskite films, leads to high external photoluminescence quantum efficiencies realized in large-area, thin-film devices. Such high-efficiency, scalable, electrostatically tunable optoelectronic switches broaden the potential applications of metal-halide perovskites in photonics and optoelectronics.

AI.tldr: 基于外延单晶金属卤化物钙钛矿的全固态半导体器件，可通过栅极电压可逆调控钙钛矿光致发光强度，实现高达65-98%的调制效率。
AI.motivation: 开发一种新型光致发光场效应晶体管，利用栅极电场静电调控界面载流子密度，从而控制光生载流子的辐射与非辐射复合通道，实现高效电控光调制。
AI.method: 采用外延单晶金属卤化物钙钛矿薄膜构建全固态半导体器件，通过栅极电压调节界面移动电荷密度，影响光生载流子的辐射与非辐射复合过程，实现光致发光强度的电控调制。
AI.result: 栅极电压可有效改变非辐射界面复合速率，实现65-98%的光致发光强度调制（取决于温度），在优化栅压下可几乎完全消除非辐射损耗，获得大面积薄膜器件的高外量子效率。
AI.conclusion: 这种高效、可扩展、静电可调的光电开关器件拓展了金属卤化物钙钛矿在光子学和光电子学中的潜在应用前景。
